description: Test vector for stellar-agent-toolset-sig:v1 preimage + ed25519 signature.
version_note: Canonical layout source for the publisher preimage.
key_type: ed25519 ephemeral test key derived from fixed TEST_SEED in tests/signature_vector.rs (NEVER a mainnet key)
test_note: The public_key_hex and signature_hex are committed constants that lock the signature. Tests in tests/signature_vector.rs assert that test-time signatures EQUAL these constants, locking the preimage layout and ed25519 determinism. The preimage bytes are the authoritative byte-layout source for the publisher preimage.
